message.content:
@startuml
title DeTrace Creature connection
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
participant "<<Creature: Wheel>>\nWheel_1" as WHEEL_1
participant "<<Creature: BBBBBB>>\nWheel_1" as BBB_WHEEL_1
participant "<<Creature: Wheel>>\nWheel_2" as WHEEL_2
box "DeTrace\nConnection Manager" #LightBlue
  participant "" as DCM_BBB
end box
participant "<<Creature: Frame>>\nFrame" as FRAME

WHEEL_1 ->> WHEEL_2 : changeOwner() [0]
activate WHEEL_2
DCM_BBB <-< WHEEL_2 : checkMatrix(3) [456789]\ncheckSlot()\ncheckOwner(Wheel)\ncdcdcdcddc[0xdeadbeef]
deactivate WHEEL_2
return connectError("Invalid owner") to WHEEL_1


FRAME <<--<< WHEEL_3 : attachTo(Frame)[0]
activate FRAME
DCM_FRAME <<-<- FRAME : checkMatrix(3)\ncheckOwner(BodyPart)\ncheckSlot(FrontLeft)
deactivate FRAME
return success(true) to WHEEL_3



@enduml
